title: Disable implicit demo fallback on transactional pages
acceptance_criteria: Transactional pages render API states (loading/empty/error) and never silently use mock arrays in production mode

title: Add global demo-data badge and action guard
acceptance_criteria: When demo data source is active UI shows persistent badge and destructive/save actions are blocked

title: Replace window.confirm with DS ConfirmDialog in all modules
acceptance_criteria: No `window.confirm(` remains in `frontend/src`; all destructive actions use standardized dialog

title: Fix project bulk action semantics
acceptance_criteria: Bulk action label and backend mutation semantics are aligned and user-visible copy is accurate

title: Persist mobile report drafts
acceptance_criteria: Draft save writes persisted entity and reopen restores draft with timestamp

title: Wire mobile write/sync APIs to UI
acceptance_criteria: UI uses create/update/submit/sync endpoints and exposes sync status to user

title: Add offline write queue for mobile workflows
acceptance_criteria: Offline submissions are queued and retried with conflict status UI

title: Modal a11y hardening (unique ids + close label)
acceptance_criteria: Modal ids are unique per instance and close button has explicit aria-label

title: Implement focus trap loop in modal
acceptance_criteria: Tab/Shift+Tab cycle remains inside modal and focus returns to trigger on close

title: Add aria-labels to icon-only DS controls
acceptance_criteria: All icon-only buttons in DS components expose accessible names

title: Add DataTable semantic header attributes
acceptance_criteria: Table headers include scope and aria-sort mapped to sort state

title: Restore runtime health baseline for audit and CI
acceptance_criteria: Backend and frontend health endpoints respond within SLA and docker commands are stable

title: Adopt i18n hook in top-traffic modules
acceptance_criteria: At least 20 highest-traffic pages use i18n message keys instead of hardcoded strings

title: Make formatting locale-driven
acceptance_criteria: All shared formatters derive locale from app state; no hardcoded ru-RU in shared helper

title: Unify form labeling with DS contract
acceptance_criteria: Form controls in target modules pass explicit id/htmlFor or DS auto-id helper

title: Implement saved views for enterprise tables
acceptance_criteria: Users can save/rename/share/default views for filters/sort/columns

title: Add autosave SDK for long forms
acceptance_criteria: Long forms autosave every N seconds and recover drafts after refresh

title: Introduce virtualized row rendering
acceptance_criteria: Large datasets render with virtualization and maintain smooth scroll at >1000 rows

title: Migrate heavy lists to server pagination
acceptance_criteria: High-volume pages request paged data from API and avoid full in-memory datasets

title: Refine domain-based code splitting
acceptance_criteria: Bundle analyzer shows domain chunks and reduced initial route payload

title: Replace static sidebar/topbar notification counters
acceptance_criteria: Notification indicators are API-driven with stale/error fallback UX

title: Role-based navigation presets and favorites
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar shows reduced role-specific navigation with user favorites

title: Upgrade TopBar into command palette
acceptance_criteria: Cmd+K opens command palette with recent entities/actions and keyboard navigation

title: Separate demo search behavior from production search
acceptance_criteria: Search result source is explicit and production uses backend data path by default

title: Replace /documents placeholder route with production module
acceptance_criteria: `/documents` renders production documents list with real filters/actions

title: Add component tests for DS primitives
acceptance_criteria: Critical DS components have deterministic component test coverage

title: Add component tests for high-risk pages
acceptance_criteria: Project/procurement/mobile/workflow pages have interaction and state tests

title: Introduce Playwright visual regression baselines
acceptance_criteria: Critical routes have screenshot baselines for 320/768/1440/1920 viewports

title: Convert smoke tests to business-critical e2e journeys
acceptance_criteria: E2E validates create project -> procurement -> movement -> payment outcomes

title: Align Playwright runtime profiles for Docker/local CI
acceptance_criteria: Test config supports docker baseURL profiles and stable auth bootstrap
